text:
Pieck is a student at Marley Academy.

Appearance

Pieck is a short young woman with long, disheveled shoulder-length black hair. She wears the standard uniform of Marley Academy.

Personality

Story

Pieck accompanied Porco and Colt to ask Levi, Hange and Mike to perform music as the band No Name as a means of solving the inequality in Marley Academy.
